rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendants American President Lines, Ltd. and Crowley Maritime Corporation¿s motion for protective order is denied. At this stage of the case, the court cannot say that otherwise permissible discovery requests seeking information about what occurred on a vessel are not calculated to lead to the discovery admissible evidence. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Tyco Electronics Corporations Deposition And Production Of Documents Or Tangible Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel Tyco Electronics Corporation¿s deposition and document production is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BILLY S. JOHNSON VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Further Motion To Compel Defendant Navistar, Inc.'S Production Of Tom Nelson For Further Deposition As Well As Production Of All Responsive Documents And Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, November 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff¿s further motion to compel defendant Navistar, Inc.¿s production of Tom Nelson for further deposition and production of responsive documents: hearing required. = (220/HEK)
